title: Animal Poison Information - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Animal Poison Information 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS ANIMAL POISON CONTROL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline for animal poison-related emergencies. The hotline is staffed by veterinarians and board-certified veterinary toxicologists. Website provides general information to help protect pets from poisonous substances, including plants, human foods, and human medications. 424 E 92nd Street New York, NY 10128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 426-4435 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PET POISON HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an animal poison control helpline for pet owners and veterinary professionals who require assistance with treating a potentially poisoned pet. Veterinarians staffing the helpline are board-certified in internal medicine, emergency and critical care, and toxicology. 3600 American Boulevard W Suite 725 Bloomington, MN 55431 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 764-7661 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
